name: Apple Snaps
recipeIngredient: 1 package sugar-free gelatin (4 serving size box)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the gelatin according to the package instructions, substituting the applesauce for cold water.
2. Chill the mixture until set.
3. Garnish with mint leaves, thin slices of apple, and a small cinnamon stick before serving.
